# Icon Button

<!-- Generated by @create-component-md. Source of truth: Figma → .md migration. -->
<!-- Figma: https://www.figma.com/design/mhUvPg9tOjlvQvEW6glQhJ/Wi-Design-System?node-id=24-9246&t=IFVa9Ez51YzczfKE-4 -->
<!-- Generated at: 2026-07-20 -->
<!-- Optional context provided: none -->

## Overview

Icon Button is a circular, icon-only action control with one visual variant (`Primary`), one roundness (`Round`), four size configurations, and three interaction states. The component centers a swappable icon inside a fixed square container, uses a fully rounded radius, and preserves the same layout across Default, Hover & Active, and Disabled states. Its icon is a constitutive `squircle` sub-component and is exposed through the `Icon` instance-swap property.

**Variant axes.** `Roundness`: Round (default); `Variant`: Primary (default); `Size`: Medium, Small, Default (default), Large; `State`: Default (default), Hover & Active, Disabled.

### Composition

- **squircle** (constitutive sub-component) — documented inline; also has its own spec at `./squircle.md` (when present).

_Classification produced by the uSpec Extract Figma plugin and reviewed at Step 4.5 of create-component-md. Constitutive children are part-of this component; referenced children are used-by it and own their own specs._

## Known gaps

### Unresolved

- **Medium** — 2 items. The extraction reports `fileKey: unknown-file`; the Figma source link below was supplied separately and could not be verified against the payload metadata. The `_base.json` was produced by uSpec Extract `2.1.0` and its `layoutTree` nodes have no IDs, so render-meta section/group targets cannot be resolved beyond the component and default-variant IDs.
- **Low** — 1 item. Screen-reader behavior is inferred from the icon-button interaction contract because the static extraction contains no authored accessibility intent or accessible-name string.

### Auto-reconciled

_None._

## Follow-ups

- Optionally generate `squircle.md` from component set node `55:8521` for a standalone canonical spec. The parent specification remains complete without it.
- Re-extract with the current uSpec Extract plugin to populate `layoutTree` node IDs and a real Figma file key.

**Cross-section invariants.** The container remains square, horizontally centered, vertically centered, fully rounded (`999`), and unclipped in every variant. State changes affect color only; dimensions remain constant within each size. Disabled changes both container and icon colors, while Hover & Active changes only the container fill. The icon swap does not change the container API or layout contract.

---

## API

_Confidence: high._

| Property | Type | Values | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Icon` | instance swap | `(instance)` | `squircle` (`55:8521`) | Required visual content. Consumers may swap the icon while preserving the size and centering contract. |
| `Roundness` | variant | `Round` | `Round` | Single exported option; maps to the fully rounded container. |
| `Variant` | variant | `Primary` | `Primary` | Single exported visual variant. |
| `Size` | variant | `Medium`, `Small`, `Default`, `Large` | `Default` | Controls container, minimum target, padding, and icon dimensions. |
| `State` | variant | `Default`, `Hover & Active`, `Disabled` | `Default` | `Hover & Active` is a combined visual state in the source component. |

### Configuration: default action

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `Icon` | application-provided icon | Must have a non-empty accessible name at the button level. |
| `Roundness` | `Round` | Only available value. |
| `Variant` | `Primary` | Only available value. |
| `Size` | `Default` | 56 × 56 container with a 24 × 24 icon host. |
| `State` | `Default` | Interactive resting state. |

### Configuration: disabled action

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `State` | `Disabled` | Removes interaction and exposes disabled semantics to assistive technology. |

### Constitutive sub-component: squircle

| Property | Type | Values | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Icon content | instance | `(instance)` | `squircle` | The parent owns the icon role and exposes it through `Icon`; the extracted sub-component has no variant axes. |

## Structure

### Anatomy

```text
Icon Button (component set · 24:9246)
└─ Icon (instance) · constitutive
   └─ Vector (vector)
```

_Confidence: high for measured dimensions; render-meta identity is limited by the older extraction payload._

### Size matrix

| Spec | Small | Medium | Large | Default | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Container width | 32 | 40 | 48 | 56 | Fixed square container. |
| Container height | 32 | 40 | 48 | 56 | Matches width in every size. |
| Minimum width | 24 | 32 | 36 | 40 | Extracted minimum layout constraint; not an accessibility target recommendation. |
| Minimum height | 24 | 32 | 36 | 40 | Matches minimum width. |
| Padding | `2xs (4)` | `xs (8)` | `xs (8)` | `hacks to fit scale/10 (10)` | Token/value as exported from Figma. |
| Icon host | 16 × 16 | 16 × 16 | 24 × 24 | 24 × 24 | Constitutive `squircle` instance. |
| Visible vector | 12 × 12 | 12 × 12 | 18 × 18 | 18 × 18 | Vector stroke weight is 1.5. |
| Corner radius | 999 | 999 | 999 | 999 | Fully rounded appearance. |
| Container stroke weight | 1 | 1 | 1 | 1 | No container stroke paint was present in `colorWalk`. |

### Layout behavior

| Spec | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Layout mode | Horizontal auto layout | Single centered icon child. |
| Main-axis alignment | Center | Stable across all variants. |
| Cross-axis alignment | Center | Stable across all variants. |
| Horizontal sizing | Fixed | Size axis controls width. |
| Vertical sizing | Fixed | Size axis controls height. |
| Item spacing | 0 | Only one child. |
| Clips content | false | Container does not clip content. |

### State deltas

| Element | Default | Hover & Active | Disabled | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Container geometry | unchanged | unchanged | unchanged | State is visual-only in the extraction. |
| Icon geometry | unchanged | unchanged | unchanged | Size is controlled only by the Size axis. |
| Interactivity | enabled | active visual | disabled | Runtime behavior must map the visual state to the platform interaction model. |

## Color

_Confidence: high._ _Note: this component embeds a constitutive sub-component; the parent's color tokens documented here are authoritative. A per-child canonical spec is an optional follow-up — see Follow-ups._

### Container and icon by state

| Element | Default | Hover & Active | Disabled | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Container fill | `Content/Tertiary` (#CCDDFA) | `Blue/200` (#DDE8FB) | `Background/Neutral` (#E5E5E5) | Default and Disabled are Light-mode resolved values from semantic variables; Hover & Active is bound directly to a primitive. |
| Icon stroke (`squircle`) | `Content/Primary` (#0F172A) | `Content/Primary` (#0F172A) | `Content/Neutral2` (#404040) | Stroke token is applied inside the constitutive icon sub-component. |
| Drop shadow | `Black/alpha-10` (#000000 at 10%) | `Black/alpha-10` (#000000 at 10%) | `Black/alpha-10` (#000000 at 10%) | Resolved style: `shadow-base`; two identical drop-shadow entries were exported per variant. |

### Theme resolution

| Token | Light alias | Dark alias | Extracted Light value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `Content/Tertiary` | `Blue/300` | `Blue/800` | #CCDDFA | Container fill in Default. |
| `Background/Neutral` | `Neutral/200` | `Neutral/400` | #E5E5E5 | Container fill in Disabled. |
| `Content/Primary` | `Slate/900` | `White` | #0F172A | Icon stroke in Default and Hover & Active. |
| `Content/Neutral2` | `Neutral/700` | `Neutral/50` | #404040 | Icon stroke in Disabled. |
| `Blue/200` | fixed primitive | fixed primitive | #DDE8FB | Container fill in Hover & Active. |

Implementation must resolve these bindings through Theme V3 semantic APIs. The hex values are extraction evidence, not permission to hardcode colors in Flutter widgets.

## Voice / Screen reader

_Confidence: medium — behavior is inferred because the extraction contains no authored accessibility copy._

> Treat the component as one atomic button focus stop. The icon is visual content and must not become a separate focus stop or contribute a duplicate announcement.

### Focus order

| # | Part | Announcement | Role | Properties | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Icon Button | Consumer-provided accessible name | Button | enabled/disabled; actionable when enabled | The accessible name must describe the action, not the glyph name. |

### State: Default

#### VoiceOver (iOS)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, button` | Use the native button trait. |
| Role | Button | One focus stop. |
| Action | Activate | Invokes the configured callback. |
| Do NOT | Announce `squircle` or the vector separately | The icon is decorative within the named button. |

#### TalkBack (Android)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, button` | Use native button semantics. |
| Role | Button | One focus stop. |
| Action | Activate | Invokes the configured callback. |
| Do NOT | Expose the icon as a child accessibility node | Avoid duplicate focus and announcements. |

#### ARIA (Web)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, button` | Prefer a native `<button>`. |
| Role | `button` | Implicit when using `<button>`. |
| Accessible name | `aria-label` or visually hidden text | Required because no visible label exists. |
| Do NOT | Use the icon's filename or glyph name as the accessible name | Name the action instead. |

### State: Hover & Active

#### VoiceOver (iOS)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | Same as Default | Hover/active styling must not add an announcement. |
| Role | Button | Remains actionable. |

#### TalkBack (Android)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | Same as Default | Pressed feedback may be conveyed by the platform without changing the name. |
| Role | Button | Remains actionable. |

#### ARIA (Web)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | Same as Default | Do not expose transient hover as a semantic state. |
| Role | `button` | Use `aria-pressed` only if the product behavior is truly toggleable; the extraction does not establish that contract. |

### State: Disabled

#### VoiceOver (iOS)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, dimmed, button` | Platform wording may vary. |
| State | Disabled | Remove the activation action. |

#### TalkBack (Android)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, disabled, button` | Platform wording may vary. |
| State | Disabled | Not clickable. |

#### ARIA (Web)

| Property | Value | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Announcement | `{accessible name}, disabled, button` | Browser/AT wording varies. |
| State | Native `disabled` | Prefer the native attribute over `aria-disabled` when possible. |

<!-- voice-render-meta v=1
{ "focusStops": [ { "name": "Icon Button", "focusOrderIndex": 1, "layerName": null, "slotIndex": null } ] }
-->

---

## Cross-references

- `Size` controls the container, minimum dimensions, padding, icon host, and vector dimensions documented in Structure.
- `State` leaves Structure unchanged and drives the Color token matrix plus enabled/disabled semantics in Voice.
- `Icon` is the API instance swap, the sole constitutive child in Structure, and the element whose stroke token is documented in Color.
- Disabled is a lockstep state: container fill changes to `Background/Neutral`, icon stroke changes to `Content/Neutral2`, and interaction semantics become disabled.

---
